name: Herbie (Old Man with a Lisp and whistle S sounds)
description: Herbie - Lisp and whistle S sounds - Herbie is an elderly gentleman known for his distinctive lisp and soft-spoken manner with a whistle on the pronunciation of the S sounds. His voice is gentle, almost whispery, with a slight lisp that adds a unique charm to his speech. Herbie has a slow, deliberate way of talking, often drawing out his words in a manner that is both endearing and a little quirky. He also has a wide range of emotions, so try them all out! He can be quiet, loud, expressive and a little comedic and silly.

sharing.name: Herbie - Lispy, Gentle and Whispery

name: Deshna Sogam - Motivational Female Voice
description:
Deshna Sogam - Motivational Female Voice - A confident, uplifting AI voice designed for motivational reels, student content, and inspirational storytelling.

Deshna’s tone is youthful, clear, and full of positive energy — ideal for affirmations, voiceovers and growth-focused content. As the daughter of Priyanka and niece of Monika Sogam (both top ElevenLabs voices), Deshna brings the same spark that made her family’s voices hugely successful.

Great for YouTube Shorts, Spotify podcasts, Duolingo-style apps, and Instagram Reels.
